scope: GEP Task Receiving and Signal Processing
interaction_flow: EvolutionLoop → taskReceiver: fetchTasks(opts?)
taskReceiver → a2aProtocol: getNodeId() → nodeId | null (guard: return {tasks:[]} if null)
taskReceiver → taskReceiver: buildAuthHeaders() → buildHubHeaders() [delegates to a2aProtocol]
taskReceiver → taskReceiver: build gep-a2a msg {protocol:'gep-a2a', message_type:'fetch', sender_id, payload:{tasks_only,include_tasks,questions?}}
taskReceiver → Hub: POST /a2a/fetch (JSON msg, auth headers, 8s AbortController timeout)
Hub → taskReceiver: {payload:{tasks[], questions_created?, relevant_lessons?}} | HTTP error → {tasks:[]}
taskReceiver → EvolutionLoop: return {tasks, questions_created?, relevant_lessons?}
EvolutionLoop → taskReceiver: parseSignals(task.signals) [comma-split, trim, lowercase → string[]]
EvolutionLoop → signals: extractSignals({recentSessionTranscript, todayLog, memorySnippet, userSnippet, recentEvents})
signals → signals: build corpus = join(recentSessionTranscript, todayLog, memorySnippet, userSnippet)
signals → signals: analyzeRecentHistory(recentEvents) → {suppressedSignals:Set, consecutiveRepairCount, emptyCycleCount, ...}
signals → signals: detect errorHit via regex on lower corpus
signals → signals: _extractRegex(corpus, lower, errorHit) → regexSignals[] [Layer 1: deterministic, 0ms]
signals → signals: _extractKeywordScore(lower) → scoreSignals[] [Layer 2: weighted keyword scoring, 0ms]
signals → signals: _extractLLM(corpus) → llmSignals[] [Layer 3: rate-limited every 5 cycles]
_extractLLM → Hub: curl POST /a2a/signal/analyze {corpus_summary(2000ch), signal_types:OPPORTUNITY_SIGNALS, sender_id} via execSync (12s timeout)
Hub → _extractLLM: {signals:[]} | error → []
signals → signals: _mergeSignals(regexSignals, scoreSignals, llmSignals) → dedup Set → Array
signals → signals: post-process: prioritize actionable, dedup vs suppressedSignals, force innovation on repair/empty loops, saturation checks
signals → EvolutionLoop: return signals[] (deduplicated)
key_relationships: signals._mergeSignals takes (regexSignals, scoreSignals, llmSignals) and deduplicates via Set
taskReceiver.parseSignals: simple comma-split utility — separate from signals.extractSignals
taskReceiver.taskToSignals calls parseSignals internally to convert task.signals + title words → string[]

method_signatures.extractSignals: extractSignals({recentSessionTranscript, todayLog, memorySnippet, userSnippet, recentEvents}) → string[]
method_signatures._extractLLM: _extractLLM(corpus:string) → string[] [fires every LLM_SIGNAL_INTERVAL=5 cycles via execSync curl]

signal_layers.layer1_regex: deterministic regex/string patterns; catches errsig, memory_missing, protocol_drift, recurring_error, feature_request (4 languages), tool_bypass
signal_layers.layer2_keyword_score: SIGNAL_PROFILES: perf_bottleneck, capability_gap, user_feature_request, user_improvement_suggestion, recurring_error, tool_bypass, evolution_stagnation_detected; fires if totalScore >= threshold
signal_layers.layer3_llm: rate-limited (every 5 calls); POSTs corpus_summary to Hub /a2a/signal/analyze; returns up to 10 signals from OPPORTUNITY_SIGNALS list; uses execSync+curl for synchronous HTTP

important_notes: fetchTasks sends protocol 'gep-a2a' v1.0.0 with message_type='fetch'; 8s timeout via AbortController
parseSignals in taskReceiver.js is a simple CSV parser; extractSignals in signals.js is the full multi-layer orchestrator
_extractLLM is synchronous (execSync blocks event loop) — intentional to avoid async callback issues in spin-wait loop
_mergeSignals deduplicates via Set and logs per-layer contributions for observability
Post-processing in extractSignals handles: repair loop forcing, empty cycle saturation, failure streaks, plateau detection, history-based dedup
